castMember.name: Urban
castMember.want: To build the greatest cannon in the world and be paid what his skill is worth.
castMember.need: To understand that a maker is not absolved by selling the use of his hands.
castMember.arc: Moves from hungry professional pride to horrified recognition of complicity.
castMember.voiceNotes: Plain, technical, unsentimental; becomes quieter as the weapon succeeds.
castMember.description: A Hungarian cannon founder from Brasso; practical, brilliant, proud, and newly more aware of the human cost of his bargain.
